[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011100110 6
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0100010000 2
5 1000010010 3
6 0011100001 4
7 0000010001 2
